guardrails: This artifact plans FR-013 reference management repair; it does not implement missing desktop/runtime behavior.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
W1.5.179 does not modify accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, runtime behavior, production renderer behavior, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.
Reference lifecycle controls planned here must remain fail-closed until runtime-backed import, enable, disable, delete, and view evidence exists.
Reference content and metadata evidence must not expose raw sensitive document text, URL secrets, secure paths, cache paths, or prompt/model output.
Reference source files remain under user-visible references/ while .agent-workflow/cache and .agent-workflow/secure stay internal and untracked.

repair_track.objective: Implement reference import, enable, disable, and view actions as a new desktop/runtime-backed capability before A4 review.
entry_criteria: Reference manifest and storage boundaries are aligned with runtime_harness.md before UI work starts.
Sensitive reference material remains local unless an explicit runtime policy allows otherwise.
planned_repair_steps: Define the project reference manifest contract used by the desktop File Tree/reference surface.
Add import, enable, disable, and view controls with safe metadata display.
Capture A4 review evidence for reference lifecycle operations.
planned_verification: Reference lifecycle A4 evidence after implementation

source_checklist_remaining_gap: Desktop reference import, enable, disable, and view actions are not implemented.
Runtime-backed reference manifest UX is not accepted.
missing_before_implementation: Desktop reference import, enable, disable, and view actions are not implemented.
Runtime-backed reference manifest UX is not accepted.
reference_management_items.source_next_action: Implement reference management as a new desktop/runtime-backed slice before A4 review.
planned_repair_steps: Define the runtime-backed reference list surface from references.manifest.json rather than local renderer state.
Plan import controls that write through POST /references and keep raw files in user-visible references/.
Plan enable, disable, and delete controls that mutate runtime manifest state without deleting source files unless the runtime contract explicitly does so.
Plan view/details controls that show safe metadata and redacted summaries, not raw sensitive document text or internal secure/cache paths.
Capture A4 review evidence only after import, enable, disable, view, and manifest refresh behavior is proven through the workbench.

required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines the runtime-backed list/read endpoint for the desktop reference surface.
Defines the import/upload endpoint that desktop controls must call.
Defines the reference removal endpoint the lifecycle plan must account for.
Defines enable/disable manifest mutation for reference lifecycle controls.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: 响应：`ReferenceEntry`（写入 `references/` + 触发索引）。
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines import response and indexing side effects.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: references.manifest.json             ← 参考资料注册表（路径 / 启用状态 / hash / chunk 状态）
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines the manifest that the desktop surface must reflect.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: references/                              ← 用户上传 / 引用的参考资料原文（用户可见）
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines where user-visible reference source files live.
Defines the manifest section that backs FR-013 behavior.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: | `enabled` | ✅ | 是否参与 EvidenceBuilder 检索 |
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines enable/disable semantics for reference search participation.
Defines indexing state that the desktop details surface must display safely.
Defines Git commit message policy for reference manifest mutations.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: | D-RH-11 | `references / outputs / workflow` 是用户可见目录；`.agent-workflow / .git / locks / cache / secure` 是 CW 内部目录 |
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Keeps desktop reference display away from internal secure/cache paths.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: | `global_context_refs` | `string[]` | ❌ | `[]` | 全局生效的参考资料 / 项目记忆引用 ID；详见 §4.1 |
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Connects reference management to workflow-level context references.
Defines reference id notation consumed by workflow graph dependencies.
Defines unresolved reference validation failure that desktop selection must avoid.

required_runtime_contracts.pattern: | `kind` | `enum: upstream_artifact / project_memory / reference / static_text / user_input` | ✅ | 来源类型 |
required_runtime_contracts.reason: Defines reference as a first-class node dependency source kind.

implementation_sequence.reason: FR-013 is a standalone missing desktop/runtime-backed lifecycle capability; import, enable, disable, and view evidence should be planned together before A4 review.
